title: Basic chat reply
summary: Use llm_reply to answer short greetings and simple conversational prompts.
goal: Handle casual conversation and short greetings.
steps: use the fallback LLM to answer compactly

title: Quick math helper
summary: Use math to evaluate small arithmetic expressions.
goal: Evaluate arithmetic expressions and return a numeric result.

title: Remember a preference
summary: Use remember to store short notes or user preferences.
goal: Store short text for later recall.
examples: remember my favorite color is blue

title: Recall notes by keyword
summary: Use recall to search stored notes by keyword.
goal: Search stored notes and return matching entries.
examples: what did i say about colors

title: Search skill library
summary: Use search_skill to find matching skill manifests.
goal: Search and display stored skill manifests.
